generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst with 20 years in the field, I've seen firsthand how outdated laws hamstring our ability to protect Americans. The 2026 Security Enhancement Act gives our agencies the tools they need to stay ahead of evolving threats. Critics who claim this expands government power ignore that we're facing sophisticated adversaries who exploit every loophole. We need modernized authorities to prevent attacks, not just react to them. The balance between security and liberty isn't fixed - we can and must have both. #NationalSecurityFirst
